goal: Create a complete, responsive single-page landing page with all requested sections, sticky navigation, footer, and placeholder content.
summary: Built a complete, responsive single-page landing page at /project/workspace/index.html for 'Momentum'. The file includes 10 semantic sections (Hero, About, Services, How It Works, Portfolio, Testimonials, Team, Partners, FAQ, Contact), a sticky top navigation bar using icon.JPG as the logo, smooth-scroll anchor links, a comprehensive footer with social/contact placeholders, responsive CSS media queries, and minimal vanilla JS for mobile hamburger menu and FAQ accordion. All placeholder copy is startup-relevant and easily replaceable. The HTML was validated as well-formed and self-contained with no build dependencies.
stepSummaries:
1. Set up index.html with DOCTYPE, viewport meta, semantic structure, and embedded CSS/JS. [verified]
  2. Implement 10 semantic sections (Hero, About, Services, How It Works, Portfolio, Testimonials, Team, Partners, FAQ, Contact) with IDs and placeholder content. [verified]
  3. Implement sticky top navigation with icon.JPG logo and smooth-scroll anchor links. [verified]
  4. Implement footer with social media and contact placeholders. [verified]
  5. Add responsive CSS media queries and minimal JS for mobile nav interactions. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase-level verification includes a real HTML validation (Python parser) confirming balanced tags and well-formed structure. Individual step verifies were structural, but the combined artifact is directly executable in a browser.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Python HTMLParser validation returned 'VALID_HTML' — all tags properly opened and closed. index.html is 27,372 bytes and self-contained.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The index.html artifact contains all required components: 10 sections, sticky nav with icon.JPG, footer, responsive CSS, and JS interactions. This directly satisfies the phase goal.
gateVerdicts.evidence: index.html contains <section> tags for all 10 requested sections, a <nav> with position:sticky referencing icon.JPG, a <footer> with social links, @media queries, and addEventListener handlers.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred; all planned work across the 5 steps was completed and verified.
